recommendations.title: Candyman
recommendations.overview: The Candyman, a murderous soul with a hook for a hand, is accidentally summoned to reality by a skeptic grad student researching the monster's myth.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Violinist
recommendations.overview: The life story of Italian violinist and composer, Niccolò Paganini, who rose to fame as a virtuoso in the early 19th Century.

recommendations.title: Paperhouse
recommendations.overview: A young girl lost in the loneliness and boredom of reality finds solace in an ill boy, whom she can visit in a surreal dream world that she drew in her school composition book.

recommendations.title: Anna Karenina

recommendations.title: Mr. Nice

recommendations.title: Immortal Beloved

recommendations.title: Sx_Tape
recommendations.overview: From the director of CANDYMAN and the producers of PARANORMAL ACTIVITY comes a found-footage nightmare of lust, possession, and destruction. Jill's an artist. Ian's a filmmaker. And their love life is off the chain. There's no experience too wild, no

recommendations.title: The Rocky Horror Picture Show
recommendations.overview: After getting a flat tire in the middle of nowhere, newly engaged couple Brad and Janet encounter the eerie mansion of the flamboyant, seductive Dr. Frank-N-Furter and a variety of eccentric characters. Through elaborate dance and rock music, the mad

recommendations.title: The Last Man on Earth
recommendations.overview: When a disease turns all of humanity into the living dead, the last man on earth becomes a reluctant vampire hunter.

recommendations.title: The Untamed
recommendations.overview: A meteorite deposits an alien monster with strange powers near the home of an unhappy couple.
